basic_details.job_title: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi (JK Anganwadi) Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website jkicds.com. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the JK Anganwadi Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.all_candidates_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years

qualification.details: Domicile of UT of J&K Women candidates Resident of the electoral Ward where Anganwadi Centre is situated Minimum qualification: 10+2 Maximum qualification: Graduation Weightage on marks obtained in 10+2, selection purely on merit Higher age preferred in case of tie Candidate with qualification higher than graduation not considered Additional two percent points for candidate within family of retiring AWW/AWH | Selection restricted to the electoral ward where Anganwadi Centre is located Women candidates Domicile of UT of J&K Minimum qualification: Matriculation If no matriculate candidate available, candidates with qualification not less than 8th standard shall be considered Selection based on marks obtained in class 10th Preference may be given to widow headed household with no income source or destitute lady with zero income source in rarest of rare cases Unmarried candidate may be considered if no married candidate is available

selection_process: Document Verification Merit basis (based on marks obtained in 10+2 for Anganwadi Worker
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JK Anganwadi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.jkicds.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download JK Anganwadi Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download JK Anganwadi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download JK Anganwadi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Domicile of UT of J&K Women candidates Resident of the electoral Ward where Anganwadi Centre is situated Minimum qualification: 10+2 Maximum qualification: Graduation Weightage on marks obtained in 10+2, selection purely on merit Higher age preferred in case of tie Candidate with qualification higher than graduation not considered Additional two percent points for candidate within family of retiring AWW/AWH Selection restricted to the electoral ward where Anganwadi Centre is located Women candidates Domicile of UT of J&K Minimum qualification: Matriculation If no matriculate candidate available, candidates with qualification not less than 8th standard shall be considered Selection based on marks obtained in class 10th Preference may be given to widow headed household with no income source or destitute lady with zero income source in rarest of rare cases Unmarried candidate may be considered if no married candidate is available

rows.fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years

rows.event: Last date for submission of applications

content_sections.heading: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Document Verification Merit basis (based on marks obtained in 10+2 for Anganwadi Worker, 10th for Anganwadi Helper)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for JK Anganwadi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.jkicds.com. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JK Anganwadi recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications is 13th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for Anganwadi Worker?
faq.answer: For the Anganwadi Worker post, the minimum qualification required is 10+2. However, candidates can have a maximum qualification of Graduation. Those with qualifications higher than graduation will not be considered.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for both Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper posts is between 18 to 37 years. There is no mention of age relaxation in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 6 vacancies are available. This includes 1 post for Anganwadi Worker (Sanginis) and 5 posts for Anganwadi Helper (Sahayikas).

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as per the instructions in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are offered on an honorarium basis. Specific salary details are not provided, but it will be an honorarium payment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Anganwadi Worker and Helper?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification and selection on a merit basis. For Anganwadi Worker, merit is based on 10+2 marks, and for Anganwadi Helper, it's based on 10th-class marks.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Jammu & Kashmir apply?
faq.answer: No, candidates must be a domicile of the Union Territory of J&K to be eligible for these posts.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any preference given to certain candidates for Anganwadi Helper?
faq.answer: Yes, preference may be given to widow-headed households with no income source or destitute ladies with zero income source in rare cases. Unmarried candidates may also be considered if no married candidates are available.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Jammu and Kashmir Anganwadi, which is www.jkicds.com.
